system_overview.name: Autonomous Office Protocol
system_overview.description: Automated workflow system for efficient office operations

components.name: Autonomous Task Manager (ATM)
components.description: Automates task assignment, updates, and project status notifications

components.name: Decision Support System (DSS)
components.description: Utilizes real-time data analytics to provide AI-driven insights for decision-making

components.name: Project Monitor
components.description: Real-time monitoring and alerting system to ensure timely project delivery

api_endpoints.description: Assign a task to a team member

task_management.title: Task Duplication and Efficient Task Management
task_management.description: Implement a database transaction mechanism to ensure atomicity in task creation and assignment.

ai_integration.title: AI-Driven Decision Support Requirements
ai_integration.description: Develop a set of requirements for the AI-driven decision support system, including data ingestion, model development, and integration with the existing system.

kpi_measurement.title: Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and Success Measurement
kpi_measurement.description: Establish a set of KPIs to measure the success of the Autonomous Office Protocol, including metrics such as task completion rates, project delivery times, and user satisfaction.

ai_guidelines.title: AI-Driven Decision Support Guidelines and Responsible AI Use
ai_guidelines.description: Develop a set of guidelines for the responsible use of AI in the system, including data quality, bias detection, and transparency in decision-making processes.
